title: Launch Alpha GTM Notes — Email Campaign & Legal Review
author: sam.okafor
content:
GTM STATUS — Launch Alpha Email Campaign
Author: Sam Okafor | Updated: 2026-04-25 09:10 UTC
Ticket: NOVA-141 | Status: IN REVIEW

Launch email status:
- Draft: COMPLETE (reviewed internally by Alice and Sam)
- Subject: 'Introducing Checkout AI Assistant — smarter checkout starts today'
- Target send: Monday 2026-04-28 09:30 PT (30 min after go-live)
- List size: ~12,000 beta waitlist subscribers

Blocker: Legal pricing sign-off
Legal review is pending on the pricing copy in the email. The phrase 'starting at $0 for the first 3 months' requires legal confirmation that this does not conflict with the enterprise agreement terms. [LEGAL-PENDING: pricing language under review — do not publish]

Send timeline:
- If legal approves by Sunday 18:00 PT → send Monday 09:30 PT on schedule
- If delayed → send Monday 12:00 PT (fallback)

All other GTM assets ready: landing page copy, social posts, press brief.
